title: NormalForm
summary: Encodes straight ambient metrics in normal form and their block metric components in the t, base, and rho directions.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Encodes straight ambient metrics in normal form and their block metric components in the t, base, and rho directions.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in Ambient/FG/NormalForm.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Data/interface: Normal Ambient Data. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: to Straight Form. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: base Scale. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: g Rho. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def gRho (A : NormalAmbientData Conf) : ℝ → Conf.MetricField

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: compat0. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem compat0 (A : NormalAmbientData Conf) (x : M) : Conf.toFiber (A.gRho 0 x) = A.baseScale.metric x

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Data/interface: Normal Metric Components. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: ambient Metric Comp. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def ambientMetricComp (C : NormalMetricComponents ι) : AmbientIndex ι → AmbientIndex ι → ℝ | AmbientIndex.zero, AmbientIndex.zero => 2 * C.rho | AmbientIndex.zero, AmbientIndex.base _ => 0 | AmbientIndex.zero, AmbientIndex.inf => C.t | AmbientIndex.base _, AmbientIndex.zero => 0 | AmbientIndex.base i, AmbientIndex.base j => C.t ^ 2 * C.g i j

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ambient Metric Comp zero zero. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ambientMetricComp_zero_zero (C : NormalMetricComponents ι) : ambientMetricComp C AmbientIndex.zero AmbientIndex.zero = 2 * C.rho

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ambient Metric Comp zero base. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ambientMetricComp_zero_base (C : NormalMetricComponents ι) (i : ι) : ambientMetricComp C AmbientIndex.zero (AmbientIndex.base i) = 0

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ambient Metric Comp base zero. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ambientMetricComp_base_zero (C : NormalMetricComponents ι) (i : ι) : ambientMetricComp C (AmbientIndex.base i) AmbientIndex.zero = 0

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ambient Metric Comp zero inf. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ambientMetricComp_zero_inf (C : NormalMetricComponents ι) : ambientMetricComp C AmbientIndex.zero AmbientIndex.inf = C.t

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ambient Metric Comp inf zero. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ambientMetricComp_inf_zero (C : NormalMetricComponents ι) : ambientMetricComp C AmbientIndex.inf AmbientIndex.zero = C.t

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ambient Metric Comp base base. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ambientMetricComp_base_base (C : NormalMetricComponents ι) (i j : ι) : ambientMetricComp C (AmbientIndex.base i) (AmbientIndex.base j) = C.t ^ 2 * C.g i j

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ambient Metric Comp base inf. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ambientMetricComp_base_inf (C : NormalMetricComponents ι) (i : ι) : ambientMetricComp C (AmbientIndex.base i) AmbientIndex.inf = 0

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ambient Metric Comp inf base. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ambientMetricComp_inf_base (C : NormalMetricComponents ι) (i : ι) : ambientMetricComp C AmbientIndex.inf (AmbientIndex.base i) = 0

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ambient Metric Comp inf inf. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ambientMetricComp_inf_inf (C : NormalMetricComponents ι) : ambientMetricComp C AmbientIndex.inf AmbientIndex.inf = 0

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: ambient Metric Comp symm. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem ambientMetricComp_symm (C : NormalMetricComponents ι) (hg : ∀ i j : ι, C.g i j = C.g j i) (I J : AmbientIndex ι) : ambientMetricComp C I J = ambientMetricComp C J I

references.locator: Chapters 2–3, ambient space and normal form
references.note: Geometric source for the ambient bundle, homogeneity, normal form, and commutator calculations.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
